# Provider Matrix

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/integrationmatrix -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to provider integration matrix](../integration-matrix.md)

| Provider | Executable | Public deterministic CI | Real CLI integration | Worktree routing status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `claude` | `go test ./internal/provider/claude`, `go test ./internal/agentbridge` | `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1 go test ./internal/provider/claude -run TestIntegration -count=1` | `supports_worktree=true` |
| Codex | `codex --sandbox danger-full-access app-server --listen stdio://` | `go test ./internal/provider/codex`, `go test ./internal/agentbridge` | `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1 go test ./internal/provider/codex -run TestIntegration -count=1` | `supports_worktree=true` |
| OpenClaw | `openclaw` | `go test ./internal/provider/openclaw`, `go test ./internal/agentbridge`, `go test ./internal/scheduling` | `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1 go test ./internal/provider/openclaw -run TestIntegration -count=1` | `supports_worktree=false`; `required_surfaces=[worktree]` must fail with `MISSING_REQUIRED_SURFACE:worktree` |
| Cursor Agent | `cursor-agent` | `go test ./internal/provider/cursor`, `go test ./internal/agentbridge` | `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1 go test ./internal/provider/cursor -run TestIntegration -count=1` | `supports_worktree=true` |

Public pull-request CI runs deterministic tests and keeps real provider integration opt-in.
The scheduled/manual [`provider-real-cli-observation`](../provider-real-cli-observation.md) workflow records available-provider evidence.

Operators can run the current local provider matrix with:

```bash
./scripts/integration-smoke.sh
```
